description: Search, bid, and message clients on Freelancer.com from Claude. Multi-account support.
name: io.github.godesigntech/freelancer-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Personal Access Token for a single Freelancer.com account. Get one at https://accounts.freelancer.com/settings/develop
environmentVariables.name: FREELANCER_OAUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: JSON object mapping account labels to Personal Access Tokens, for connecting multiple Freelancer.com accounts in one server, e.g. {"main":"token1","client_acme":"token2"}
environmentVariables.name: FREELANCER_ACCOUNTS
